name: Villa Eleni Beach Hotel
tagline: Where Greek hospitality meets the Aegean breeze

pool.description: Large outdoor pool with sea view and children's shallow pool

beach.description: Private sandy beach with sunbeds and umbrellas (complimentary)

restaurant.name: Taverna Eleni
restaurant.description: Main restaurant serving Mediterranean and traditional Greek cuisine

bar.name: Aegean Sunset Bar
bar.description: Pool and beach bar with cocktails, snacks, and stunning views

kidsClub.name: Little Eleni Kids Club
kidsClub.description: Supervised activities, games, and crafts for children

parking.reservation: Not required, first come first served

breakfast.included: In most room types — confirm per rate
breakfast.description: Traditional Greek and international buffet with fresh local produce, pastries, eggs station, cold cuts, cheeses, yogurt, and fruit

airportTransfer.price: €85 one way (up to 4 guests), €110 for minivan (up to 8 guests)
airportTransfer.booking: Must be booked at least 24 hours in advance

pets.note: We are a pet-free property to ensure comfort for all guests

smoking.policy: Non-smoking throughout, including rooms and balconies
smoking.smokingArea: Designated outdoor smoking area near the main entrance

babysitting.note: Available on request with 24-hour advance notice, additional charge applies

faq.a: Breakfast is included in most room types. We recommend confirming when booking as it depends on the rate selected.

faq.q: Do you have a children's pool?
faq.a: Yes, we have a dedicated shallow children's pool next to the main pool.
Yes, on-site parking is completely free for all guests. No reservation needed.

faq.q: How far are you from the airport?
faq.a: We're about 85 km from Thessaloniki Airport, approximately 1 hour by car. We offer airport transfers starting from €85.

faq.q: Can I request an early check-in?
faq.a: Early check-in is subject to availability and may carry an extra charge. Please let us know your arrival time and we'll do our best.
Yes, we have our own private sandy beach with complimentary sunbeds and umbrellas for all guests.
Yes! Blue Serenity Spa is open daily 10:00–20:00. We recommend booking treatments in advance.
